## Checklist

- [ ] `make build && make test && make lint` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed behavior (per-package coverage ≥ 80%)
- [ ] No secret values are logged or committed
- [ ] User-facing error messages are in English
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/flags/UX changed
